q.en: What are special effects in movies?

options.en: Real events filmed live by news cameras
options.zh: 由新闻摄像机实拍的真实事件

options.en: The part of moviemaking that creates pictures and sounds to make movies seem real
options.zh: 电影制作中制造画面与声音、让电影显得逼真的一部分

options.en: The actors who perform in a movie
options.zh: 在电影里表演的演员

options.en: The music played during the credits
options.zh: 片尾字幕时播放的音乐

explain.en: The book says special effects are the part of moviemaking that creates pictures and sounds that can make movies seem real.
explain.zh: 书里说，特效是电影制作中创造画面与声音、让电影显得逼真的一部分。

options.en: A French magician who invented early effects
options.zh: 发明早期特效的法国魔术师

options.en: The actor who played King Kong
options.zh: 扮演金刚的演员

options.en: A master of movie special effects in the 1920s and 1930s who helped create King Kong
options.zh: 20世纪20至30年代的特效大师，参与创作了《金刚》

options.en: The director of the 2009 movie Avatar
options.zh: 2009年电影《阿凡达》的导演

explain.en: The book calls O'Brien a master of movie special effects in the 1920s and 1930s who helped create the special-effects spectaculars audiences still love.
explain.zh: 书里称奥布莱恩是20世纪20至30年代的特效大师，参与创作了观众至今仍喜爱的特效大片。

q.en: How did Willis O'Brien make King Kong's gorilla models?
q.zh: 威利斯·奥布莱恩是怎样制作金刚的大猩猩模型的？

options.en: With computer-generated images (CGI)
options.zh: 用电脑生成图像（CGI）

options.en: Using a metal skeleton with joints, padded with cotton and foam rubber, and covered with rabbit skins
options.zh: 用带关节的金属骨架，内填棉絮和泡沫橡胶，外覆兔皮

options.en: By drawing them with pencils on paper
options.zh: 用铅笔画在纸上

options.en: By filming a real gorilla in a zoo
options.zh: 在动物园里拍摄一只真大猩猩

explain.en: O'Brien built gorilla models using a metal skeleton with joints, padded them with cotton and foam rubber, and covered them with rabbit skins to resemble fur.
explain.zh: 奥布莱恩用带关节的金属骨架做模型，内填棉絮和泡沫橡胶，外覆兔皮来模拟毛发。

q.zh: 定格动画是怎么运作的？

options.en: Actors move while a computer records their voices
options.zh: 演员走动，电脑录制他们的声音

options.en: Miniature models are photographed one frame at a time in different positions so they appear to move
options.zh: 微缩模型被一帧一帧地摆出不同位置拍摄，看起来像在动

options.en: Real animals are filmed running very fast
options.zh: 拍摄真实动物快速奔跑

options.en: Pictures are painted by hand after the movie ends
options.zh: 电影结束后用手工绘制画面

explain.en: With stop-motion animation, miniature models were photographed one frame at a time in different positions; when projected in sequence they appeared to move.
explain.zh: 定格动画中，微缩模型被一帧一帧地摆出不同位置拍摄，连续放映时看起来就像在动。

q.en: What is rear projection used for?
q.zh: 背景放映（rear projection）用来做什么？

options.en: To make actors look taller than they really are
options.zh: 让演员看起来比实际更高

options.en: To create fake scenery behind an actor
options.zh: 在演员身后制造假的背景布景

options.en: To record the movie's sound track
options.zh: 录制电影的音轨

options.en: To color the actor's clothes
options.zh: 给演员的衣服上色

explain.en: Rear projection is a type of special effect that creates fake scenery behind an actor, like making it look like someone is driving on a beach.
explain.zh: 背景放映是一种特效，用来在演员身后制造假的布景，比如让人看起来像在海滩上开车。

q.en: With color-replacement photography, what happens to the colored screen?
q.zh: 在颜色替换摄影中，那块彩色屏幕会怎样？

options.en: It stays in the final movie as part of the picture
options.zh: 它保留在最终电影里，成为画面一部分

options.en: It is erased so the background becomes visible where the color was
options.zh: 颜色被擦除，原来颜色的位置就显出背景

options.en: It is painted over by the actor
options.zh: 被演员涂掉

options.en: It becomes the movie's title
options.zh: 变成电影的片名

explain.en: An actor is filmed in front of a blue or green screen; the color is later erased and the background shows through wherever the color was.
explain.zh: 演员在蓝幕或绿幕前拍摄，之后颜色被擦除，原本颜色的地方就透出背景。

options.en: A type of music played in movies
options.zh: 电影里播放的一种音乐

options.en: A way to edit films on a computer
options.zh: 用电脑剪辑电影的方法

options.en: A process that creates characters using electronic robots controlled by remote control
options.zh: 用遥控电子机器人制造角色的一种技术

options.en: Painting backdrops by hand
options.zh: 用手工绘制背景

explain.en: Animatronics creates characters using electronic robots; a crew controls the robots' movements through remote control. It was used for E.T. and the shark in Jaws.
explain.zh: 电子动画用遥控电子机器人制造角色，工作人员用遥控器控制其动作，曾用于《E.T.》和《大白鲨》中的鲨鱼。

q.en: Why are miniature models useful in movies?
q.zh: 微缩模型在电影里有什么用？

options.en: They replace the actors completely
options.zh: 完全取代演员

options.en: They are used instead of filming real buildings and look life-size on film
options.zh: 用来代替拍摄真实建筑，在胶片上看似真人大小

options.en: They make the movie shorter
options.zh: 让电影变短

options.en: They record the movie's dialogue
options.zh: 录制电影的对白

explain.en: Rather than filming a real building, miniature models are often used; on film the models look life-size.
explain.zh: 电影常常用微缩模型代替拍摄真实建筑，在胶片上看上去如同真人大小。

q.en: How do filmmakers create a storm at sea without real danger?
q.zh: 电影人如何在没有真实危险的情况下拍出海上风暴？

options.en: They send actors out into a real hurricane
options.zh: 把演员送进真实的飓风里

options.en: Actors sit safely in a boat in a pool while machines make waves, wind, and rain; the scene is filmed in front of a blue screen
options.zh: 演员安全地坐在水池中的船上，机器制造波浪、风和雨，并在蓝幕前拍摄

options.en: They use only photographs of the ocean
options.zh: 只用海洋的照片

options.en: They ask the audience to imagine the storm
options.zh: 让观众自己想象风暴

explain.en: Actors sit safely in a boat in a large pool; a machine makes waves, fans make wind, and sprinklers make rain. The scene is filmed in front of a blue screen replaced later with a real storm.
explain.zh: 演员安全地坐在大水池中的船上，机器制造波浪、大风扇制造强风、洒水器制造暴雨，并在蓝幕前拍摄，之后再替换成真实风暴。

q.en: What did computers (CGI) make possible in special effects?
q.zh: 电脑（CGI）让特效实现了什么？

options.en: They ended the need for any cameras
options.zh: 不再需要任何摄像机

options.en: They could only make black-and-white images
options.zh: 只能制作黑白图像

options.en: They revolutionized effects and can create almost any imaginable effect, even a whole movie
options.zh: 彻底改变了特效，能制造几乎任何想象得到的特效，甚至整部电影

options.en: They replaced all the actors with puppets
options.zh: 用木偶取代所有演员

explain.en: Computers helped revolutionize special effects; with CGI artists can create scenes never thought possible, even an entire movie like The Polar Express.
explain.zh: 电脑彻底改变了特效，凭借CGI艺术家能创造以往无法想象的场景，甚至拍出整部像《极地特快》这样的电影。

prompt.en: Which special-effects technique from the book do you find most amazing, and how do you think it changes the way a story feels to the audience?
prompt.zh: 书中介绍的特效技术里，你觉得哪一种最令人惊叹？你认为它如何改变了观众对故事的感受？

en: Name one technique (such as stop-motion, animatronics, or CGI) and what it does.
Explain why that technique helps the audience believe or enjoy the movie.
zh: 说出一种技术（如定格动画、电子动画或CGI）及其作用。
解释这种技术为什么能让观众相信或享受这部电影。
